Aries.overview: The Sun in Leo this month spotlights romance, creativity, and wholehearted play for Aries. Jupiter in Leo grows opportunities around romance, creativity, and wholehearted play. Saturn in Aries structures progress in identity, vitality, and first impressions — discipline beats speed.
Aries.love: Vulnerability offered at the right pace magnetises the right people and repels performative interest.
Aries.career: Negotiate scope and worth early; late-month pressure makes the same terms harder to land.
Aries.health: Emotional load shows in the body; rest is maintenance, not indulgence.
Aries.methodNote: Month scaffold from mid-month ephemeris + solar houses; daily email uses getDailyHoroscope per send date.
